auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

passwordStrength.hint: Use uppercase, numbers and symbols to strengthen

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email to receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.error: Unable to request password reset. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Use at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successful. You can now sign in.

auth.accountLocked: Your account is locked after too many failed attempts. Please contact an administrator.

departmentAccess.title: Department Access
departmentAccess.subtitle: Read-only view of users, roles and validation level per department.

reportBuilder.title: Report builder
reportBuilder.subtitle: Define custom reports, run them on demand or schedule email distribution.
reportBuilder.name: Report name
reportBuilder.deleteConfirmBody: Scheduled runs for this report will stop.

delegations.mySubtitle: Delegate your approvals to a colleague while you are away.
delegations.revokeConfirmBody: You will no longer be able to approve on this delegate's behalf once revoked.

accessRequests.mySubtitle: Request an additional role. An administrator will review your request.
accessRequests.adminSubtitle: Review role requests. Approving automatically grants the role to the requester.
accessRequests.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why you need this role…
accessRequests.formIncomplete: Please select a role and provide a reason.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.adminNote: As Administrator, use the Administration menu to manage users, departments, and view the audit log. Invoice processing and financial data are managed by the Finance team.
dashboard.supplierNote: Track your invoices, submit new ones, and receive payment notifications from this dashboard.

agingBuckets.title: Overdue invoice aging
agingBuckets.desc: Overdue amounts by bucket (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days) with per-supplier rollup.

po.title: Purchase Orders
po.subtitle: Manage purchase orders linked to supplier invoices
po.importHint: Upload an Excel or CSV file exported from your procurement system.

financial.title: Financial Audit Trail
financial.subtitle: Immutable record of all financial events — invoice submissions, approvals, rejections, payments.
financial.immutableNote: This audit trail is immutable — records cannot be modified or deleted.

system.title: System & Security Audit Log
system.subtitle: User logins, role changes, security events, and system activity.

invoice.title: Invoices
invoice.newTooltip: Use this to register an invoice received by email or on paper. Invoices submitted by suppliers via the portal appear here automatically.

import.tooltip: Import invoices from a CSV or XML file
import.title: Import invoices
import.hint: CSV file (one invoice per row) or XML (several <invoice> elements). Each line is processed independently.
import.choose_file: Choose a CSV or XML file
import.unreadable_file: The file is unreadable or in an unsupported format.

invoice.poHint: Linking a PO enables automatic three-way matching on submission.
invoice.duplicateWarning: A similar invoice already exists for this supplier in the last 12 months. Please check before submitting.
invoice.duplicateWarning_one: A similar invoice already exists for this supplier in the last 12 months. Please check before submitting.
invoice.duplicateWarning_other: {{count}} similar invoices already exist for this supplier in the last 12 months. Please check before submitting.
invoice.lineItemsHint: Add invoice line items. These are compared against the PO during matching.
invoice.dropFiles: Drop files or click to select

bulkUpload.title: Bulk document upload
bulkUpload.subtitle: Select multiple files to attach to this invoice in one go.

viewer.noPreview: No preview available for this file type.

invoice.wrongDept: This invoice belongs to a different department. You cannot approve it.
invoice.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this invoice is being rejected...
invoice.deptScopeNote: Showing invoices from your department only.
invoice.resubmitHint: This invoice was rejected. Correct the issues and resubmit for re-evaluation.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.subtitle: Operational reports, compliance summaries, and data exports.
reports.exportExcelDesc: Download a filtered invoice register in XLSX format.
reports.exportPdfAuditDesc: Available from the invoice detail page.
reports.exportPdfComplianceDesc: Approval sequence compliance, SLA adherence, exceptions and overrides for the selected period.
reports.dateRangeHint: Date range applies to exports only. Live metrics show all-time data.
reports.budgetDesc: Each department's budget compared to committed spend (invoices excluding drafts and rejected ones).
reports.agingDesc: Overdue invoices grouped by days outstanding.
reports.cashFlowDesc: Projected payment obligations for the next 30 days.

supplierPerformance.title: Supplier Performance
supplierPerformance.desc: Accuracy, rejection rate and average payment time for a selected supplier.
supplierPerformance.prompt: Select a supplier to view their performance metrics.

trends.title: Volume / value trends
trends.desc: Invoice count and total amount per month over the last 12 months (by invoice date).

reports.dateRangeRequired: Select a date range to generate the compliance report.
reports.noData: No data available for the selected period.

users.title: User Management
users.createError: Failed to create user. Please check the inputs and try again.
users.approvalLimitHint: Maximum invoice amount this user can approve. Leave blank for no limit.
users.disableConfirmBody: The user will no longer be able to sign in until the account is reactivated.
users.activateConfirmBody: The user will be able to sign in again.
users.resetMfaConfirmBody: The user will need to set up their authenticator app again at their next login.

departments.title: Department Management
departments.name: Name
departments.createError: Creation failed. Check the fields (code must be unique).
departments.matrixNote: To edit approval chains, use the Approval Matrix.
departments.subtitle: OCT departments and BAP approval chains

retention.title: Retention compliance
retention.sweepOverdue: The last retention sweep is overdue.

approvalMatrix.title: Approval Matrix Configuration
approvalMatrix.subtitle: Configure which role approves invoices for each department.

security.title: Security Settings
security.mfaRequired: MFA required for all staff roles
security.subtitle: Configure system-wide security policies.
security.saveError: Could not save the security policy.
security.sessionTimeoutNote: The user is automatically signed out after this period of inactivity.
security.mfaDesc: TOTP-based two-factor authentication for all staff accounts.
security.sessionTimeoutDesc: Idle sessions are terminated after this many minutes.
security.maxLoginAttemptsDesc: Account is locked after this many consecutive failures.
security.passwordMinLengthDesc: Minimum number of characters required for all passwords.
security.revokeSessionConfirmBody: The user will be signed out immediately and will need to log in again.

permissions.title: Permission Matrix
permissions.subtitle: Assign roles to users. Tick or untick a role, then Save that row.

announcements.title: System announcements
announcements.subtitle: Messages shown on every user's dashboard.
announcements.deleteConfirmBody: This announcement will no longer be visible on any dashboard.

compliance.title: Security & Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Backups, incidents, SOX/IFRS checklist, compliance calendar.

auditPrep.title: Audit preparation
auditPrep.subtitle: At-a-glance readiness: open incidents, checklist progress and upcoming deadlines.

connectors.title: Integration connectors
connectors.subtitle: Connect external systems (ERP, accounting, banking, DMS). The MOCK type simulates a connection.
connectors.name: Name
connectors.deleteConfirmBody: Scheduled synchronisation for this connector will stop immediately.

integrations.title: Integrations & Webhooks
integrations.subtitle: Configure connections to external systems and webhook endpoints.
integrations.noDeliveries: No deliveries recorded for this webhook.
integrations.deleteWebhookConfirmBody: Deliveries to this endpoint will stop immediately.

delegations.title: Approval Delegations
delegations.subtitle: Reassign a validator’s approval authority during an absence.
delegations.empty: No active delegations for this department.
delegations.revokeConfirmBody: The delegator will regain sole approval authority for this department.
delegations.missingFields: Please fill in department, both users, and the date range.
delegations.sameUser: The delegator and delegatee must be different users.
delegations.badRange: The end date must be on or after the start date.

matchingConfig.title: Three-Way Matching Configuration
matchingConfig.subtitle: Tolerance thresholds applied when matching invoices against purchase orders and goods receipts.
matchingConfig.tolerancePercentageHint: Maximum percentage difference allowed between invoice and PO amounts.
matchingConfig.toleranceAmountHint: Maximum absolute amount difference allowed, regardless of percentage.
matchingConfig.requireGrn: Require a Goods Receipt Note (GRN) for matching
matchingConfig.badPercentage: Tolerance percentage must be between 0 and 100.
matchingConfig.badAmount: Tolerance amount must be 0 or greater.

backups.title: Backup and restore
backups.restoreConfirmDesc: Do you really want to simulate a restore from {{file}}? In production, this would overwrite the current data.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.hint: Click a notification to mark it as read.

ocr.formats: PDF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF — max 10 MB
ocr.digitalPdf: Digital PDF — extracted via text layer (high accuracy)
ocr.scanned: Scanned document — extracted via OCR (please verify all fields)
ocr.reviewPrompt: Review and correct the extracted fields below, then submit.
ocr.error: Could not extract data from the file. Please fill in the fields manually.

checklist.title: Validation Checklist Templates
checklist.subtitle: Reusable checklists shown to validators during invoice review.
checklist.name: Name
checklist.noItems: No items yet. Add at least one.
checklist.itemPlaceholder: e.g. Amount matches the purchase order
checklist.saveError: Failed to save the template. Check the inputs and try again.
checklist.requiredHint: Some required items are not yet checked (informational — does not block validation).

matching.title: Three-Way Matching (Invoice / PO / GRN)
matching.pending: Matching will run automatically on submission.
matching.overridePlaceholder: Explain why this discrepancy is acceptable...
matching.pageSubtitle: Three-way matching (invoice, purchase order, goods receipt).

resolve.title: Resolve Discrepancy
resolve.description: Please justify the acceptance of the discrepancy for item: {{item}}.
resolve.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Supplier entry error, accepted by business unit...
resolve.errorLength: Justification must be at least 5 characters.

approvals.title: Approval Queue
approvals.hint: Click "Review" to open the invoice and record your decision.
approvals.slaNote: SLA: 3 business days per approval level. Red = SLA breached. Amber = last day.
approvals.slaBreached: {{count}} invoice(s) have exceeded the 3-day SLA — immediate action required.

roleLabel.daf: Invoices awaiting your Bon à Payer authorisation

invoice.no_document: Please attach at least one document before submitting the invoice.

register.title: Register as Supplier
register.subtitle: Create your supplier account to submit invoices
register.successMessage: Check your email to verify your account before logging in.

verify.successMessage: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.
verify.errorMessage: Invalid or expired token. Please request a new verification email.

tracking.title: Invoice Tracking
tracking.subtitle: Track your invoice status in real time

submit.title: Submit Invoice
submit.subtitle: Upload your invoice — we will extract the data automatically for your review.
submit.uploadSub: PDF, JPEG, PNG or TIFF — max 10 MB
submit.resubmitSub: This invoice was rejected. Correct the issues described in the rejection notice and submit again.

documents.title: My Documents
documents.subtitle: Tax certificates, contracts, and other compliance documents required by OCT.

profile.title: My Company Profile
profile.bankDetailsHint: Stored encrypted. Enter your full bank account details for payment processing.

actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this supplier? This cannot be undone.

onboarding.title: Supplier onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Guide a supplier through creation, verification, and activation readiness.
onboarding.summaryHelp: Review the collected information before creating the supplier record.
onboarding.ready: The supplier can be created once the banking details are confirmed.

mfa.invalidOtp: Invalid code. Check your app and try again.
mfa.challengeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication (MFA)
mfa.mandatory: MFA is mandatory for your role. You must set it up before your next login.
mfa.configuredDesc: Your account is protected by a TOTP code generated by your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy…).
mfa.confirmed: MFA enabled successfully! It will be required at your next login.
mfa.setupDesc: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy, or any compatible TOTP app.
mfa.scanQrDesc: Open your authenticator app and scan this code.
mfa.qrCodeAlt: QR code for MFA setup — scan with an authenticator app

payments.subtitle: Record payments and view history
payments.remittanceError: No remittance advice is available for this payment yet.

paymentAlerts.title: Payment Alert Rules
paymentAlerts.subtitle: Configure when payment due-date reminders are sent (J-N).
paymentAlerts.daysHint: Alert is sent when an invoice is this many days from its due date.
paymentAlerts.label: Label
paymentAlerts.empty: No rules — the default 7-day reminder applies.
paymentAlerts.saveError: Failed to save the rule (a rule for this number of days may already exist).

archive.title: Digital Archive
archive.subtitle: All archived invoices — search and download
archive.noResults: No document matches your search criteria.
archive.retentionNote: A SHA-256 checksum is computed and stored when each document is uploaded (integrity reference). The OCT retention policy targets a 10-year retention period.

archiveFolders.title: Archive folders
archiveFolders.name: Folder name
archiveFolders.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this folder?

grn.title: Goods Receipt Notes (GRN)
grn.subtitle: Record goods received against purchase orders

supplierOnly.title: Supplier portal registration
supplierOnly.note: This form is for external suppliers only. OCT staff accounts are created by the System Administrator — contact your IT department for access.

sensitivity.title: Data Sensitivity
sensitivity.subtitle: Confidentiality level of this financial record.

backups.title: Backup & Restore
backups.restoreConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to simulate restoring from {{file}}? In production, this would overwrite current data.

escalationRules.title: Escalation Rules
escalationRules.subtitle: Configure how long after a missed deadline an approval is escalated.
escalationRules.hoursHint: Escalation is sent once an approval is overdue by this many hours (0 = immediately).
escalationRules.label: Label
escalationRules.recipientNote: The recipient is determined automatically: the next approval tier in the same department, otherwise the DAF.
escalationRules.empty: No rules — escalation is immediate to the DAF by default.

retentionPolicy.title: Retention Policy
retentionPolicy.subtitle: How long invoice documents are kept before being flagged for disposition.
retentionPolicy.note: The sweep is non-destructive: documents past the retention period are flagged (audited) so an administrator can decide on their disposition. No automatic deletion.
retentionPolicy.yearsHint: Documents older than this period will be flagged on the next daily sweep.

archiveCompliance.title: Archive compliance
archiveCompliance.subtitle: Compliance status of the document archive repository. No financial data.

retentionDisposition.title: Purge controls
retentionDisposition.subtitle: Invoice documents past the retention period awaiting a decision.
retentionDisposition.note: "Purge" is a compliance marking: the file is not physically deleted from storage. The decision is recorded in the audit log.
retentionDisposition.noteFooter: "Purge" is a compliance marking; the file is not physically deleted.
retentionDisposition.emptyHint: All archived documents are within their retention period.
retentionDisposition.confirmPurgeBody: Compliance marking; the file is not physically deleted from storage. This action is recorded in the audit log.
retentionDisposition.loadError: Failed to load documents to process.

roleGuard.unauthorizedDetail: You do not have the necessary permissions to access this page.

documentUploader.dragOrClick: Drag and drop or click to add files
documentUploader.formatsHint: PDF, PNG, JPG, XLSX (max {{max}} MB per file)
